hint.pointAtBarcode: Point at a barcode to scan

bottomHint: Supports EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC-A and QR codes

gallery.title: Photo Scan
gallery.description: Photo barcode scanning is coming soon. For now, please use the camera to scan barcodes directly.
gallery.noBarcode: No barcode was detected in this image. Try a clearer photo with the barcode visible.
gallery.scanError: Could not scan this image. Please try a different photo.

permission.title: Camera Access Required
permission.description: BiteInsight needs camera access to scan food labels and barcodes.

alert.scanFailedMessage: Could not process this barcode. Please try again.

search.title: Search Results
search.serverBusy: The product database is temporarily busy. Please try again in a moment.
search.prompt: Search for a product by name
